allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; tags=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['Tags']; [print\(t\) for t in tags if 'v1.12' in t or t.startswith\('v0.1'\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; releases=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['tag_name']\) for r in releases[:20]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; body=json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('body',''\); [print\(l\) for l in body.split\('\\n'\) if 'iscsi' in l.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); helm=d.get\('definitions',{}\).get\('v1alpha1ApplicationSourceHelm',{}\).get\('properties',{}\); print\([k for k in helm.keys\(\)]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; ns=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ns['spec']['finalizers']=[]; json.dump\(ns, sys.stdout\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Download client: {d.get\(\\"name\\", d\)}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f'Root folder: {r[\\"path\\"]}'\) for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Sonarr root folder: {d.get\(\\"path\\",d\)}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; clients=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{c[\\"name\\"]} \(id={c[\\"id\\"]}\)'\) for c in clients]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Added: {d.get\(\\"name\\", \\"error\\"\)}, id={d.get\(\\"id\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) if isinstance\(d,dict\) else print\(d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Added: {d[\\"name\\"]}, id={d[\\"id\\"]}'\) if isinstance\(d,dict\) and 'name' in d else print\(d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Added: {d.get\(\\"name\\",d\)}'\) if isinstance\(d,dict\) else print\(d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f'  Download client: {c[\\"name\\"]}'\) for c in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f'  Proxy: {p[\\"name\\"]}'\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Status: {d.get\(\\"status\\"\)}, Solution status: {d.get\(\\"solution\\",{}\).get\(\\"status\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\)")
